acceptOwnership().details: The new owner accepts the ownership transfer.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

pendingOwner().details: Returns the address of the pending owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Starts the ownership transfer of the contract to a new account. Replaces the pending transfer if there is one. Can only be called by the current owner.

addLiquidityToTorusTitanXPool(uint32).notice: Creates the TitanX/TORUS pool and seeds initial liquidity

burnTorus().notice: Burns all Torus tokens held by the contract.

setDailyAllocationETHBuilding(uint256).notice: Sets daily allocation for ETH (build flow).

setDailyAllocationETHBurning(uint256).notice: Sets daily allocation for ETH (burn flow).

setDailyAllocationTitanXBuilding(uint256.notice: Sets daily allocation for TitanX (build flow).

setDailyAllocationTitanXBurning(uint256).notice: Sets daily allocation for TitanX (burn flow).

swapETHForTorusAndBuild(uint32).notice: Swaps ETH for TitanX, then swaps half of the TitanX for Torus and adds liquidity (build flow).

swapETHForTorusAndBurn(uint32).notice: Swaps ETH for Torus and burns the Torus tokens (burn flow).

swapTitanXForTorusAndBuild(uint32).notice: Swaps TitanX for Torus and adds liquidity (build flow).

swapTitanXForTorusAndBurn(uint32).notice: Swaps TitanX for Torus and burns the Torus tokens (burn flow).
